DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF AL FERRARI'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING FURTHER RESPONSE TO INSPECTION DEMAND AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S INSPECTION DEMAND NO. 5 IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HALLINAN & HALLINAN, PC IS ORDER TO DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER WITHOUT OBJECTION COPIES OF ALL DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO PLAINTIFF'S DEMAND. TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFENDANT CLAIMS THAT IT PRESENTLY POSSESS NO SUCH DOCUMENTS, OR THAT IT NEVER POSSESSED SUCH DOCUMENTS, IT SHALL FILE A SWORN AFFIDAVIT SETTING FORTH THE BASIS OF ITS CLAIM. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,860.00 WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST DEFENDANT HALLINAN & HALLINAN, PAYMENT OF WHICH SHALL BE MADE TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-31-2020 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY, 302, PLAINTIFF AL FERRARI'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JAN-31-2020. JUDGE PRO TEM: KATHERINE GALLO; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Attendance At Deposition And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Feb-20-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter Hadiaris, Esq., 415-694-0052, appearing for Plaintiff Al Ferrari;
Burke Hansen, 415-572-6890, appearing for Defendant Hallinan & Hallinan PC;

All parties Stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF AL FERRARI'S Motion For Order Compelling Attendance At Deposition And Production Of Documents is taken under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Inspection Demand And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jan-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Peter N. Hadiaris, esq. (415-694-0052) for Plaintiff.
Burke Hansen, esq. (415-863-1520) of Halllinan & Hallinan, PC for Defendant.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF AL FERRARI's Motion For Order Compelling Further Response To Inspection Demand And Production Of Documents:

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFF'S INSPECTION DEMAND NO. 5 IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HALLINAN & HALLINAN, PC IS ORDER TO DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER WITHOUT OBJECTION COPIES OF ALL DOCUMENTS RESPONSIVE TO PLAINTIFF'S DEMAND. TO THE EXTENT THAT DEFENDANT CLAIMS THAT IT PRESENTLY POSSESS NO SUCH DOCUMENTS, OR THAT IT NEVER POSSESSED SUCH DOCUMENTS, IT SHALL FILE A SWORN AFFIDAVIT SETTING FORTH THE BASIS OF ITS CLAIM. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,860.00 WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST DEFENDANT HALLINAN & HALLINAN, PAYMENT OF WHICH SHALL BE MADE TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF WITHIN TEN (10) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.

order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
